Issue No. 26/2017   August EFY2017  Page 1.

root_sections.title: 1.  Summary
root_sections.summary:
1.  Summary
The Consumer Price Index (CPI), a key economic statistics, is surveyed, analyzed, and made available  Content
to data users on a monthly basis. The year-on-year, general inflation rate (annual percentage change) in the country stood at 13.6 percent for the month of August EFY2017.

root_sections.title: Issue No. 26/2017   Page 9
root_sections.summary:
Issue No. 26/2017   Page 9
Recent Improvements in  CPI  Price survey
The monthly consumer price data collection first started in Addis Ababa in 1963 (1955 E.C).  The consumer price survey which started in the capital city helped to prepare Consumer Price Index (CPI) for the city of Addis Ababa which was used as an indicator of national price movement for long time periods.
